name: backend-agentic-marketplace
description: Agentic backend-engineering plugins for Claude Code. Plugin #1: explorer (explore-once, understand-forever codebase memory). Slots reserved for builder, reviewer, and ops plugins.

plugins.name: explorer
plugins.description: Explore a backend codebase ONCE with breadth+depth sub-agents, then write a durable .claude/explorer/ memory so any future session understands the code (what / why / how) without re-exploring.
